name: @lastest/pool-service
description: EB pool service — standalone singleton process owning the browser-capacity plane (k8s Job provisioning, pool caps, warm pool, EB reapers). The app consumes only ./client and ./common.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/main.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --log-level=warning
